articles.title: Brent crude tops $70 per barrel on Iran concern; gold and silver tumble from record highs - as it happened
articles.summary: Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news, as metal prices continue to soar

articles.title: Brent Crude Settles at Highest Since July on Trump's Iran Threat
articles.summary: Brent crude futures settled above $70 a barrel for the first time since July after US President Donald Trump warned Iran to make a nuclear deal or face military strikes.

articles.title: Brent crude tops $70 per barrel on Iran attack concerns
articles.summary: Brent oil futures prices jumped on Thursday, hitting a four-month high on rising concerns of the potential ‍impact a possible U.S. ‍military attack on Iran.

articles.title: Oil prices rise 3% as winter storm slams US output
articles.summary: Oil prices edged up on Tuesday as a massive winter storm hit crude production and affected refineries on the U.S. Gulf Coast.

articles.title: Oil futures surge 3% a barrel as winter storm slams US output
articles.summary: By Georgina McCartney HOUSTON, Jan 27 (Reuters) - Oil prices settled 3% higher on Tuesday as producers reeled from a winter storm that hobbled crude production and drove U.S. Gulf Coast crude exports to zero over the weekend.
